states.name: Snow White
states.title: A Midsummer Snow's Dream
states.description: Snow White has never seen the sea before. Raised in a dark forest on the outskirts of a small kingdom, she's only ever heard of things like the summer sun and the azure sea in bedtime stories. "S-Sorry I made you wait," she says, nervousness mixed with excitement in her voice. When your eyes meet, she makes a peace sign with both hands to hide her embarrassment. "Let's make a lot of good memories today!"

states.name: Snow White
states.title: A Midsummer Snow's Dream
states.description:
"What a revolting season..."
Unexpectedly, Snow Black manifests to take control. However, she seems to have emerged at the wrong moment—she immediately hides from the sun underneath a beach umbrella, loudly voicing her displeasure. Evil as she is, even she cannot bring herself to act in uncomfortable conditions.
"What are you waiting for? Hurry up and help me put on some sunbathing oil."

states.name: Snow White
states.title: A Midsummer Snow's Dream
states.description:
Even the warmest midsummer dream turns into a chilling nightmare in Snow Black's hands. Her bitterness unleashed, she freezes the sun, the sea, even the summer moon, and fills people's hearts with fear.
"I won't let you ruin everyone's summer fun," a voice says, and all of a sudden there's a girl standing before her.
"Haha, you came at last! Very well, let's have some fun... Princess."
